ORDER TO TRANSFER CASE (TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY)
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-08-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SQUIRES-BELT MATERIAL CO.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT THOSE WITNESSES IT HAS LOCATED WOULD BE INCONVENIENCED BY TRIAL IN SAN FRANCISCO AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS LIVED AND WORKED FOR ESSENTIALLY THE ENTIRE RELEVANT TIME PERIOD IN THE SAN DIEGO AREA AND NEVER IN SAN FRANCISCO, FROM WHICH THE COURT INFERS THAT WITNESSES NOT YET LOCATED OR IDENTIFIED WILL ALMOST CERTAINLY BE CENTERED IN THE SAN DIEGO AREA, MORE THAN 500 MILES FORM SAN FRANCISCO AND WOULD ALSO MORE THAN LIKELY BE INCONVENIENCED. PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED NO COUNTER EVIDENCE SUGGESTING EITHER THAT SAN DIEGO WOULD BE AN INCONVENIENT VENUE OR SAN FRANCISCO AN APPROPRIATE ONE IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE. THE COURT IS NOT INCLINE TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE GOOGLE LISTINGS BUT HE IS INCLINE TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE SECRETARY OF STATE LISTINGS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2008 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JOEL BRUCE DOUGLAS, ESQ.(BONNE BRIDGES), (213)738-5834, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY SQUIRES-BELT MATERIAL CO.
CHRISTINE A. RENKEN, ESQ., (415)332-4262, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, HARVEY MCDONNELL

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SQUIRES-BELT MATERIAL CO.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT THOSE WITNESSES IT HAS LOCATED WOULD BE INCONVENIENCED BY TRIAL IN SAN FRANCISCO AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS LIVED AND WORKED FOR ESSENTIALLY THE ENTIRE RELEVANT TIME PERIOD IN THE SAN DIEGO AREA AND NEVER IN SAN FRANCISCO, FROM WHICH THE COURT INFERS THAT WITNESSES NOT YET LOCATED OR IDENTIFIED WILL ALMOST CERTAINLY BE CENTERED IN THE SAN DIEGO AREA, MORE THAN 500 MILES FORM SAN FRANCISCO AND WOULD ALSO MORE THAN LIKELY BE INCONVENIENCED. PLAINTIFF HAS OFFERED NO COUNTER EVIDENCE SUGGESTING EITHER THAT SAN DIEGO WOULD BE AN INCONVENIENT VENUE OR SAN FRANCISCO AN APPROPRIATE ONE IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE. THE COURT IS NOT INCLINE TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE GOOGLE LISTINGS BUT HE IS INCLINE TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE SECRETARY OF STATE LISTINGS. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB/LB)

Joinder To Deft Squires-Belt Material Co'S Mo To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. CHRISTINE A. RENKEN, TEL. NO. 332-4262 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - DEFENDANT FRASER'S BOILER SERVICE, INCORPORATED'S Joinder To Defendant Squires-Belt Material Company's Motion To Change Venue IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR# 7077 =301/HEK/PM
